title: Shared execution root for planner sizing and coalesced followup behavior
description: Non-runnable feature container for the planner and scheduler changes required to produce smaller developer beads and shared followup beads without breaking legacy auto-followup behavior.
acceptance_criteria: All implementation, validation, documentation, and review work for this spec is represented as child beads.
The child bead graph preserves backward compatibility for existing planned and manually created developer beads.
Shared followup work is modeled explicitly at feature level rather than as per-developer followup siblings of the feature root.
